---
type: entity
created: 2026-06-15
updated: 2026-06-15
sources:
  - "[itu-t-l-1470-greening-digital](../sources/itu-t-l-1470-greening-digital.qmd)"
  - "[ITU-T L.1500 (Adaptation Framework)](../sources/itu-t-l-1500-adaptation-framework.qmd)"
tags:
  - "organization"
aliases:
  - "United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change"
  - "UN Framework Convention on Climate Change"
---

## Related Entities
- [International Telecommunication Union](international-telecommunication-union.qmd)
- [United Nations](united-nations.qmd)
- [COP30](cop30.qmd)

## Related Concepts
- [Paris Agreement](../concepts/paris-agreement.qmd)
- [1-5c-scenario](../concepts/1-5c-scenario.qmd)
- [Climate Action](../concepts/climate-action.qmd)
- [Climate Change Adaptation](../concepts/climate-change-adaptation.qmd)

## Mentions in Source
- "The Paris agreement of the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change [b-UNFCCC PA], which aims to keep a global temperature rise in 2100 well below 2°C above preindustrial levels, entered into force 2016-11-04." 
- "According to the UNFCCC, 'Most methods of adaptation involve some form of technology, which in the broadest sense includes not just material and equipment but also diverse forms of knowledge.'"
